title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Usopp, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 0–3.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Usopp, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Zoro and Sogeking vs. Kaku and Jyabura

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I told you, I like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I surely got the worst ones....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are those weird hand- cuffs!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I told you, I don't have time!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What did you say just now....!?

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Usopp, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice.
